_meta.description: lesson_02 の語彙カード画像生成プロンプト（S列投入用）。master_prompt_design_guide_v2_9.py 準拠。A1: 肌色フレーズなし（diverse_unspecified）。A3: アスペクト比プレフィックスなし（GAS経由=ASPECT_RATIO:1:1 付与）。

vocab_type_mapping.p1_distant_building（建物3語+山1語）: building → Template B / 山 → Template D
vocab_type_mapping.p3_pronoun（わたし1語）: person → Template A（自己指示ジェスチャー）

notes.skin_policy: diverse_unspecified: 肌色フレーズを追記しない（v2.7〜確定方針）
notes.aspect_ratio: GAS経由生成のため本文にアスペクト比指定なし（generateImages.gs が ASPECT_RATIO:1:1 を自動付与）

special_notes.山: 建物グループに属するが vocab_type=concrete_object。遠景ランドマークとして Template D 変形で設計。
special_notes.わたし: 代名詞。handoff v2.9 §8 の判定: わたし/あなた → person として可。自己指示ジェスチャー（手を胸に当てる）で視覚化。
special_notes.病院: lesson_01 でも登場するが、lesson_02 では「遠くの建物」文脈（あれは病院です）。再生成推奨（L1と同じ画像で代用も可）。

vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "時計" (clock) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from a wristwatch without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a round wall clock or standing desk clock with a clean circular face.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A large circular clock face that fills the subject area
- Two clock hands (hour and minute) in contrasting sizes, positioned at approximately 10:10
- Hour markers: 4 simple flat dots or short dashes at 12, 3, 6, 9 positions only (NO numerals)
- NO wristwatch strap or band — this is a standalone clock body
- Thick circular outer frame/bezel distinguishing it from a wristwatch face

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The clock is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 view from eye level — shows the clock face AND the narrow depth of the frame edge.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "腕時計" (wristwatch) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this from a wall clock without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a wristwatch lying flat or at a slight angle.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A leather or metal band/strap visible on BOTH sides of the watch case — this is the #1 identifier
- A small rectangular or oval watch case in the center
- Clock face with 2 hands and minimal hour markers (no numerals)
- A buckle or clasp visible on one end of the strap

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The wristwatch is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: canonical 3/4 view from slightly above — shows the watch face AND the strap wrapping around.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "ペン" (pen) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this from a pencil without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a ballpoint or felt-tip pen.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- Smooth cylindrical body (NOT hexagonal — that is a pencil)
- A fine pointed tip or ball nib at one end — smooth metal or plastic tip
- A clip on the side of the barrel
- A cap or button at the opposite end from the tip
- NO visible wood core, NO sharpened cone — pen tips are narrow and uniform

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The pen is placed diagonally, centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 view from above — shows the cylindrical body AND the fine tip.
Solid white background.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]

Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "鉛筆" (pencil) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this from a pen without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a standard wooden pencil.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- HEXAGONAL cross-section body — show the six flat facets clearly on the barrel
- A sharply sharpened pointed tip at one end: the classic cone shape with a short exposed graphite core (dark gray triangle)
- A small flat eraser cap (pink or warm beige) crimped to the opposite end with a silver ferrule ring
- Flat body color stripes along the facets (classic yellow or muted warm amber)

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The pencil is placed diagonally, centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 view from above — shows the hexagonal cross-section AND both the tip and eraser end.
Solid white background.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "ケータイ" (cell phone / smartphone) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a modern smartphone.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- App icon grid visible on the screen — small colored rounded squares in a 3×4 grid pattern
- Rear camera module: a cluster of 2-3 circular lens openings in the top-left corner of the back
- Status bar at the top of the screen showing simplified signal/battery icons
- A thin diagonal white highlight line across the top-right of the screen (glass surface)
- Thin metallic frame line along the edges

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The smartphone is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 from above showing screen face AND one side edge.
Solid white background.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "本" (book) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this from a magazine or notebook without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a hardcover or softcover book.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A clearly visible thick spine with many page edge lines on the opposite side (stacked thin horizontal lines)
- Hard or soft cover with a distinct solid-color rectangular cover
- Significantly thicker body than a magazine — the depth/spine width is prominent
- A bookmark ribbon or fabric tail hanging from the top of the spine (optional but recommended)
Do NOT add a masthead banner (that is a magazine).

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The book is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 view from slightly above — shows the cover face AND spine AND visible page edge stack simultaneously.
Solid white background.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]

- A bold masthead/title banner printed as a flat color block across the very top of the cover — this is the #1 identifier (render it as a colored rectangle strip, NO actual letters)
- Multiple cover layout zones suggesting different articles: 2-3 colored rectangular blocks or photo areas stacked on the cover
- Visibly thin body compared to a book — the spine depth is narrow
- A faint saddle-stitch line along the spine center
- Subtle curved lines at the bottom edge of pages suggesting glossy paper

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The magazine is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 view from slightly above — shows the front cover AND the narrow spine thickness.
Solid white background.

deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "新聞" (newspaper) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this from a magazine or book without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a newspaper, folded in half horizontally.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- Large broadsheet format — significantly wider than a magazine
- Folded in half horizontally with a visible horizontal fold crease across the center
- Multi-column layout suggested by 3-4 parallel thin vertical lines across the face (simplified columns, no text)
- Uncoated matte paper texture: no glossy highlights — slightly irregular edges suggesting newsprint
- Slightly wrinkled appearance at the fold and edges
Do NOT make it small or glossy (that is a magazine).

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The newspaper is centered and fills 70-80% of the image, slightly tilted for visual interest.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 from above — shows the fold crease and the column layout.
Solid white background.

The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "かばん" (bag / carry bag) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a medium-sized carry bag (shoulder bag or tote style).

- Dashed stitching lines along the edges suggesting fabric or leather material
- A small front pocket (optional) suggesting storage capacity

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "消しゴム" (eraser) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a standard rectangular rubber eraser.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A small rectangular block shape — distinctively small and squat compared to other stationery
- One corner or one end is slightly worn/rounded showing actual eraser use (this is the key identifier)
- A partial paper sleeve wrapper around the body — the wrapper is partially peeled back, showing the bare rubber beneath
- The worn end shows a slight scuff or smudge mark (flat dark gray area) indicating it has been used

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The eraser is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: canonical 3/4 view from slightly above — shows the top face AND the worn end AND the paper wrapper.
Solid white background.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The building must be IMMEDIATELY and UNAMBIGUOUSLY recognizable as a [オフィスビル / office building] at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is [a modern multi-story glass-and-concrete office building, 8-10 floors tall, rectangular tower shape].
A single short Japanese signage word [ビル] is mounted clearly near the entrance.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue sky background.

Functional cues — 3 anchors required:
- Entrance cue: [Wide glass automatic door entrance at ground level, with a small awning above]
- User action cue: [A tiny flat-vector business person silhouette entering or exiting the front door]
- Surrounding anchor: [A row of uniform windows — at least 3 columns × 5 rows of identical rectangular windows on the facade]

The building fills 70% of the frame. Negative space in the top one-third for sky.
Entrance and functional cues are clearly visible.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white or pale sky-blue background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm colors for the building facade,
warm amber gold for accent details.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
EXCEPTION: A single short Japanese building name signage [ビル] is permitted — limited to ONE word only, small, mounted on the building entrance.
No other text, letters, numbers, or symbols anywhere in the image.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

vocabulary._note: lesson_01 にも登場。lesson_02 では「遠くの建物」文脈（あれは病院です）。lesson_01 の word_病院 画像を再利用しても可。

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is [a clean white multi-story hospital building with a prominent red cross symbol on the facade].
A single short Japanese signage word [病院] is mounted clearly near the entrance.

Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue sky background.

Functional cues — 3 anchors required:
- Entrance cue: [Wide automatic sliding door entrance with a small covered canopy, ambulance bay or accessible ramp visible]
- User action cue: [A tiny flat-vector patient figure with a crutch or a doctor silhouette entering the entrance]
- Surrounding anchor: [A large red cross flat icon mounted prominently on the upper facade — the single strongest hospital identifier]

The building fills 70% of the frame.

Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue sky background.

- Entrance cue: [Wide formal entrance with 3-4 stone steps leading up to large double doors — civic authority cue]

vocabulary._note: lesson_02 の p1_distant_building グループに属するが、建物ではなく自然地形。vocab_type=concrete_object。Template D変形（遠景ランドマーク）で設計。
vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "山" (mountain) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a mountain — a natural landmark, NOT a building.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A large, clear triangular silhouette with a pointed or slightly rounded peak at the top
- A small white snow cap (flat white triangle) at the very tip of the peak
- Gentle curved ridgeline on both slopes — organic curves, not perfect straight lines
- The mountain base fills the lower portion of the frame; the peak reaches into the upper portion

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE (landscape variant).
The mountain silhouette is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: straight front view at slight 3/4 — shows the full mountain profile.
Pale soft blue or cream sky background (simple flat color only). No trees, no people, no roads.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
The mountain body: flat muted blue-gray fill. The snow cap: flat white.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "人" (person / human) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A generic adult person in their 30s with a neutral, friendly, approachable expression.
Wearing simple casual everyday clothes — a plain top and trousers. No role-specific items (no uniforms, no tools).
Pose and expression: standing in a natural, relaxed upright posture, arms loosely at sides, slight warm smile.
The character's "ordinariness" must be immediately obvious — no job, no role, just a human being.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — camera at subject's eye height, rotated approximately 30-45 degrees to one side.
Solid white background. No other characters or objects in the frame.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

vocabulary._note: 代名詞。handoff v2.9 §8: わたし/あなた → person として可。自己指示ジェスチャー（手を胸に当てる）で視覚化。CHARACTER_RENDERING_POLICY: diverse_unspecified。
vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "わたし" (I / me / myself) at a glance.
This is a self-referential pronoun — the image must convey the concept of 'the speaker pointing to themselves'.

[SUBJECT]
A generic adult person in their 30s with a neutral, friendly expression.
Wearing simple casual everyday clothes — a plain top and trousers.
Pose and expression: the person is pointing to their OWN CHEST with one hand, with a confident and clear self-referential gesture.
The pointing hand is flat-vector simplified, palm side toward chest, index finger touching the sternum area.
Facial expression: clear, direct eye contact with the viewer, slight smile of self-identification.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — camera at subject's eye height, rotated approximately 30-45 degrees to one side.
Solid white background. No other characters or objects in the frame.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

vocabulary._note: 生物（いる系）。尾や足の角度をわずかに非対称にして「生命活性」をエンコードする（Deep Research 資料: 存在弁別の生物vs非生物）。
vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "犬" (dog) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a generic friendly dog (medium-sized, similar to a Shiba Inu or Labrador silhouette).
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- Four legs clearly visible (grounded stance)
- A tail — curved upward or wagging to one side (asymmetric, NOT perfectly centered)
- Floppy or upright ears on the sides of the head
- A visible snout/muzzle area, distinctly longer than a cat's
- The pose is SLIGHTLY ASYMMETRIC — one front paw slightly raised or the tail at an angle — to encode biological aliveness (生命活性)

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The dog is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 view from eye level — shows the full body profile AND the face.
Solid white background. No owner, no leash, no background scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image.
Generate as if this is part of a unified educational brand style guide.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "写真" (photograph / photo) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: a physical photograph print.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A rectangular photo with a classic white border around all four edges (characteristic photo print border)
- Inside the photo area: a simple landscape scene (mountain silhouette or a sunny landscape) rendered in flat muted colors — to clearly signal 'this is a captured image of something'
- One corner of the photo is slightly curled or lifted — the classic indicator of a physical photo print
- The photo is placed at a slight tilt (5-10 degrees) to emphasize it is an object, not a framed artwork

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE.
The photograph print is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: straight-on or slight 3/4 from above — shows the white border AND the interior image content AND the curled corner.
Solid white background.
